initiative.name: Tick-Based Initiative (from Scion: Hero)
initiative.description: Dynamic initiative system replacing static initiative from the core book.

system.setup: Each participant rolls d10 + Dexterity + Composure. Highest total gets 0 ticks, all others get (highest - their total) ticks.
system.acting: When a participant has 0 ticks remaining, they may act. If multiple participants have 0 ticks, highest Wits acts first.

aim.effect: +1 die per tick spent on next attack

system.resolution: When no participants have 0 ticks, all participants remove ticks one at a time until someone reaches 0.
